sections.paragraph:
Original: מכנדבי

Transliteration: maknadbay

Phonetic: mak-nad-bah'-ee

BDB Definition:

Machnadebai = "he brought low my willing ones"
  1. one of the sons of Bani who put away his foreign wife at Ezra's command

Origin: from H4100 and H5068 with a particle interposed

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
